tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 蔽芾甘棠，勿翦勿伐，召伯所茇。 蔽芾甘棠，勿翦勿敗，召伯所憇。 蔽芾甘棠，勿翦勿拜，召伯所說。

1 [This] umbrageous sweet pear-tree Clip it not, hew it not down. Under it the chief of Sliaou lodged.
2 [This] umbrageous sweet pear-tree Clip it not, bi*eak not a twig of it. Under it the chief of Sliaou rested.
3 [This] umbrageous svreet pear-tree Clip it not, bend not a twig of it. Under it tlie chief of Sliaou halted.
3 Who can say that the rat has no molar teeth? How else could it bore through my wall?
